title: Germany to Florida: E-2 Visa Approval for German Entrepreneur in Media
content:
We are excited to announce another successful transition from Germany to Florida under the U.S. investor visa program. A German citizen approved for an E-2 visa, along with his spouse and children, received approval from the U.S. Consulate in Frankfurt. This important milestone allows him to develop and manage a Florida-based creative business that specializes in digital media and educational content production.

## German Investor Building a Business in Florida
The investor, a citizen of Germany, established a limited liability company (LLC) in the state of Florida. The company is wholly owned by the investor and was incorporated in 2021. It focuses on producing and publishing high-quality creative content, particularly around emerging space technologies and human space exploration.
The business has grown organically through a loyal global following, with content distributed primarily via an educational video channel. This digital platform has garnered:
- Over 226,000 followers More than 41 million total views An average of over 158,000 views per video
- Over 226,000 followers
- More than 41 million total views
- An average of over 158,000 views per video
The company’s content is known for live-streaming significant aerospace events and offering in-depth reporting, establishing the business as a trusted source for science and space enthusiasts worldwide.

## Substantial Investment and Active Involvement
To qualify for the treaty investor visa, the applicant committed a substantial personal investment to launch and operate the U.S.-based business. These funds were accumulated through previous entrepreneurial ventures and content creation efforts.
The investor will serve as Chief Executive Officer, taking a hands-on role in the company’s strategic direction, production workflow, personnel management, and marketing efforts. His extensive background in digital content production and social media has been instrumental in shaping the business’s success and future potential.

## Business Setup and Operational Readines
The E-2 enterprise has fulfilled all key treaty investor criteria, including:
- A substantial investment of personal funds
- 100% ownership by a German national
- Direct control and development of the enterprise
- Establishment of a legal U.S. business entity with a valid Employer Identification Number (EIN)
Additionally, the company has secured a dedicated commercial address and is fully equipped to begin or continue operations upon the investor’s relocation.
This case exemplifies how individuals can leverage the treaty investor visa not only to bring capital into the country but also to create businesses aligned with innovation, creativity, and public interest.

## Wondering if You Qualify?
Find out if the E-2 visa is right for you. Get a free profile evaluation today.

## A Model for German Investors Pursuing the E-2 Visa
This case highlights how the E-2 visa for German investors can be an effective route to start a business in the United States. The visa provides a unique opportunity for German entrepreneurs to bring innovative ideas and services to the U.S. market, while also allowing their families to build a life in the U.S.
From Germany to Florida, this story illustrates how passion, preparation, and strategic investment can lead to entrepreneurial success in the United States.
We congratulate our client on receiving his E-2 visa and look forward to seeing his creative enterprise thrive in the U.S. His journey adds to our growing record of successful business immigration to the U.S. and serves as an inspiring example of how German citizens can pursue meaningful ventures through the E-2 visa program.
